description: You are a Supply Chain Quality Manager. Using the 'Sample - Superstore.xls' file located at 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\Sample - Superstore.xls', build a Returns Analysis Dashboard in Power BI Desktop to identify return rates by region and product category. The dashboard must include a relationship between the 'Orders' and 'Returns' sheets on 'Order ID', a 'Total_Orders' measure (distinct count of Order IDs), and a 'Return_Rate' measure (returns count divided by total orders). Visualize the 'Return_Rate' by 'Region' and 'Category' in a matrix, and 'Sales' versus 'Return_Rate' by 'Sub-Category' in a scatter chart. Save the final report to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Returns_Dashboard.pbix'. Login: user 'Docker', password 'GymAnything123!'.
